## Unit name

<!-- Full name of the unit (e.g., "kilopound-force"). -->

## Symbol

<!-- Conventional written symbol (e.g., "kip"). -->

## Dimension

<!-- length, mass, time, force, pressure, etc. -->

## Conversion factor to the SI base of that dimension

<!-- Numeric factor with full precision. State the SI base unit explicitly. -->

## Authoritative source

<!-- URL or full citation: NIST SP 811, ISO 80000, BIPM SI Brochure, or a
recognized engineering reference. -->

## Proposed Python identifier

<!-- The attribute name to expose (e.g., `kip`, `psi`, `MPa`). Must be a valid
Python identifier and not collide with existing names. -->
